personas.name: Jordan
personas.voice: Detail-oriented and pragmatic. Spends most days in candidate sourcing tools, scheduling interviews, and writing offer letters. Frustrated by repetitive screening tasks.

personas.name: Priya
personas.voice: Strategic and people-first. Coaches engineering managers on team health, leveling, and performance conversations. Often pulled into ad-hoc consulting on cross-team issues.

personas.name: Alex
personas.voice: Curriculum-minded and analytical. Owns onboarding, manager training, and skills development. Always trying to measure if training actually changes behavior.

personas.name: Sam
personas.voice: Process-oriented and systems-thinking. Owns HRIS, benefits enrollment, immigration cases, and policy documentation. Prefers automation over manual work.

personas.name: Riley
personas.voice: Data-driven and meticulous. Spends time benchmarking salaries, modeling equity refreshes, and analyzing pay equity. Comfortable with spreadsheets and SQL.

personas.name: Morgan
personas.voice: Strategic and CEO-adjacent. Thinks about org design, culture, exec hiring, succession planning. Wants HR to be a competitive advantage, not just a cost center.
